description: A marketplace + campaign management platform connecting Brands, Agencies, and Influencers, with end-to-end workflows from discovery to execution, plus affiliate tracking and analytics.
section_subheading: From discovery to payments, everything you need to scale influencer marketing.

capabilities.title: Influencer Discovery
capabilities.subtitle: Find & Shortlist
capabilities.description: Browse influencers by category, niche, location, language, and audience type.

capabilities.title: Communication & Hub
capabilities.subtitle: Chat & Negotiation
capabilities.description: Built-in chat for centralized communication and deal negotiation.

capabilities.title: Campaign Management
capabilities.subtitle: Creation & Assignment
capabilities.description: Create campaigns with objectives, creative briefs, and influencer assignments.

capabilities.title: Live Tracking
capabilities.subtitle: Real-time Status
capabilities.description: Live status tracking for each creator and deliverable with alerts.

capabilities.title: Analytics & ROI
capabilities.subtitle: Detailed Reporting
capabilities.description: Deep analytics on detailed reach, views, engagement, and campaign ROI.

capabilities.title: Affiliate Marketing
capabilities.subtitle: Clicks + Attribution
capabilities.description: Generate trackable links and track conversions and revenue per influencer.

capabilities.title: Payments & Compliance
capabilities.subtitle: Roadmap Ready
capabilities.description: Manage payment milestones, invoicing, and contract acceptance tracking.
